{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211419361B2E211530422F11A2A0"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614634240835617561","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"妥妥的爽文啊，给送外卖的我看的贼舒服，把美女全部拿下，哈哈哈哈，不错不错！继续写呀，加油加油","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":8,"text":"送外卖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%80%81%E5%A4%96%E5%8D%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740739762F11A2A0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614634240835617561%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227599221626315492377%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%80%81%E5%A4%96%E5%8D%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772929361,"group_id":"7599221626315492377","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzeAexlphni/bPMsEgzrsBSiSS80VD0AdxbYPkE+Vkpu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/14af4bdf1429410b8eb82238f6b958ad~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618139&x-signature=U71KqxKGRErZE%2FB%2FYujlAsNFhvY%3D","user_id":"2784426376046504","user_name":"沃幺烟白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2784426376046504","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599221626315492377","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市爽文+多女主+探案系统+虐渣搞笑】
林默是个满脸麻子、自卑到不敢摘口罩的底层外卖员。
一次送餐误入凶案现场，被暴力警花苏晴当成变态杀手死死按住。
这一按，却激活了【外卖神探系统】，只要送单遇案，破案就变强！
首单奖励【盛世美颜丹】，当他在审讯室摘下口罩的那一刻。
警花看呆：这特么是嫌疑人？这分明是谪仙下凡！
从此，林默在送外卖的路上越跑越偏：
给校花送奶茶，顺手破了坠楼悬案。
帮女总裁送文件，挖出豪门惊天黑幕。
连去好莱坞送个披萨，都能顺便拿回世界神探金奖！
暴力警花、清纯校花、温柔御姐、顶流网红、冰山女总、国际影后……
面对六大女神的全球通缉和围追堵截，林默骑着小电驴瑟瑟发抖：
“美女们请自重，我真的只是个送外卖的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4794bbf3aade80f64f37f26004783d77~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"枕木艮","author_id":"","book_id":"7599221626315492377","book_name":"探案就变强，美女警花追着我跑","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2368人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599221701393531417","read_count":"2368","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"401705"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"160","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,系统,打脸,多女主,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4794bbf3aade80f64f37f26004783d77~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257976&x-signature=SEr5hNut%2F3VEmH9%2BMRWk822oQLw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2880342236599805","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"312"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211419361B2E211530422F11A2A0"}"},
